A B O U T

Hello There 👋. I am Srijiith a.k.a k1R4, a highschool student passionate about cybersecurity. I ❤️ pwn (binary exploitation). I speak javascript, python and C. Supporter of FOSS 💪. Always excited about new hardware ✨. Nice to meet you!

follow me on twitter :)
